---
title: "Documentaries"
date: 2026-02-28
date-modified: 2026-02-28
format:
  html:
    css: style.css
listing:
  fields: [title, year]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Title"
    year: "Year"
  type: table
  date-format: YYYY‑MM‑DD
  table-hover: false
  categories: false
  max-items: 99999999
  page-size: 99999999
  contents: data.yml
---
